name: Monitor SEO keyword rankings with SERP API & send drop alerts via Slack

nodes.name: Daily SEO Check Trigger
nodes.notes:
🕐 DAILY SCHEDULER

Why this node?
• Automatically runs SEO checks every day at 8 AM
• Ensures consistent daily monitoring without manual intervention
• Uses cron expression '0 8 * * *' for daily 8 AM execution
• Essential for tracking keyword ranking changes over time

What it does:
• Triggers the entire SEO monitoring workflow
• Runs Monday through Sunday automatically
• Can be modified to run multiple times per day if needed

nodes.name: Get Keywords Database
nodes.notes:
📊 KEYWORD DATABASE

Why this node?
• Stores all keywords to monitor in one central location
• Easy to add/remove keywords without changing workflow
• Maintains historical ranking data for comparison
• Allows team collaboration on keyword list management

What it does:
• Reads keywords, target URLs, and previous rankings
• Provides data structure: keyword, url, previous_rank, current_rank
• Acts as the source of truth for all SEO monitoring
• Enables bulk processing of multiple keywords

nodes.name: Filter Active Keywords Only
nodes.notes:
🔍 KEYWORD FILTER

Why this node?
• Saves API costs by only checking active keywords
• Prevents processing empty or disabled keyword entries
• Allows temporary disabling of specific keyword monitoring
• Improves workflow efficiency and performance

What it does:
• Filters out empty keyword fields
• Only processes keywords marked as 'monitor_active = true'
• Reduces unnecessary API calls to SERP services
• Ensures clean data flow to ranking APIs

nodes.name: Fetch Google Rankings via SERP API
nodes.notes:
🌐 GOOGLE RANKING FETCHER

Why this node?
• Gets real-time Google search rankings for keywords
• Uses SERP API to avoid Google blocking/rate limiting
• Fetches top 100 results to catch ranking changes
• Provides accurate, location-specific ranking data

What it does:
• Searches Google for each keyword
• Returns organic search results with positions
• Captures ranking data for specified location (US)
• Handles Google's anti-bot measures automatically
• Costs ~$0.001 per search (check SERP API pricing)

nodes.name: Parse Rankings & Detect Changes
nodes.notes:
⚙️ RANKING ANALYZER

Why this node?
• Processes complex SERP API responses into usable data
• Finds your website's position in search results
• Calculates ranking changes compared to previous data
• Determines which keywords need attention/alerts

What it does:
• Searches through 100 organic results for your URL
• Matches domain/subdomain to find exact ranking
• Calculates ranking improvement/drop numbers
• Sets alert flags for drops > 2 positions
• Handles cases where website is not found in top 100

nodes.name: Filter Significant Ranking Drops
nodes.notes:
🚨 ALERT FILTER

Why this node?
• Only sends alerts for significant ranking changes
• Prevents spam from minor 1-2 position fluctuations
• Focuses attention on keywords that truly need action
• Saves notification costs and reduces alert fatigue

What it does:
• Filters keywords with drops > 2 positions
• Includes keywords that disappeared from top 100
• Passes only actionable ranking issues
• Reduces noise in alerting system

nodes.name: Update Rankings in Google Sheet
nodes.notes:
📈 RANKING HISTORY TRACKER

Why this node?
• Maintains historical ranking data for trend analysis
• Updates previous_rank for next day's comparison
• Creates audit trail of all ranking changes
• Enables manual review and reporting

What it does:
• Updates current rankings in Google Sheet
• Records ranking changes and status
• Timestamps each check for historical tracking
• Stores found URLs for verification
• Prepares data for next day's comparison

nodes.name: Send Slack Ranking Alert
nodes.notes:
💬 SLACK NOTIFICATION

Why this node?
• Provides instant alerts to SEO team
• Rich formatting shows ranking details clearly
• Integrates with existing team communication
• Allows immediate team discussion and action

What it does:
• Sends formatted alert to designated Slack channel
• Includes keyword, ranking change, and URLs
• Shows current vs previous ranking comparison
• Provides actionable information for quick response
• Can mention specific team members if needed

nodes.name: Send Email Ranking Alert
nodes.notes:
📧 EMAIL NOTIFICATION

Why this node?
• Provides detailed alert for serious ranking drops
• Creates email trail for management reporting
• Reaches team members who may not use Slack
• Professional format suitable for stakeholder updates

What it does:
• Sends HTML-formatted email with ranking details
• Includes actionable recommendations
• Shows before/after ranking comparison
• Provides links for immediate investigation
• Can be forwarded to management or clients

nodes.name: Generate SEO Monitoring Summary
nodes.notes:
📊 EXECUTION SUMMARY

Why this node?
• Provides overview of daily SEO monitoring results
• Tracks workflow performance and success metrics
• Helps identify trends in keyword performance
• Useful for reporting and debugging

What it does:
• Counts total keywords processed
• Summarizes alerts sent and ranking changes
• Calculates average ranking across all keywords
• Logs detailed execution summary to console
• Creates data for dashboard reporting
• Confirms workflow completed successfully

parameters.content:
## How it works
* **Daily SEO Check Trigger** initiates the workflow on a scheduled basis
* **Get Keywords Database** retrieves your keyword list and current ranking data
* **Filter Active Keywords Only** processes only keywords marked as active for monitoring
* **Fetch Google Rankings via SERP API** gets current ranking positions for each keyword
* **Wait For Response** Wait for gets current ranking positions
* **Parse Rankings & Detect Changes** compares new rankings with historical data and identifies significant drops
* **Filter Significant Ranking Drops** isolates keywords that dropped beyond your threshold (e.g., 5+ positions)
* **Send Slack Ranking Alert** notifies your team channel about ranking drops
* **Send Email Ranking Alert** sends detailed email reports to stakeholders
* **Update Rankings in Google Sheet** saves new ranking data for historical tracking
* **Generate SEO Monitoring Summary** creates a comprehensive report of all ranking changes

main.node: Fetch Google Rankings via SERP API
